issue_summary: make varius places where bad data can cause RuntimeExceptions throw checked exceptions

javadoc_after: /** * Initializes the arrays based on the maximum code size. * First checks that the estimated memory usage is below memoryLimitInKb * * @param maxCodeSize maximum code size * @param memoryLimitInKb maximum allowed estimated memory usage in Kb * @throws MemoryLimitException if estimated memory usage is greater than memoryLimitInKb * @throws IllegalArgumentException if maxCodeSize is not bigger than 0 */
